title: Real-Time Next.js Application with WebSocket
description: Complete route for adding real-time push communication to a Next.js app — WebSocket server, pub/sub scaling with Upstash Redis, background job processing, and production deployment.

steps.description: Initialize a new Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up styling with Tailwind CSS v4
Add Socket.io with a custom Node.js server for real-time bidirectional communication
Add Upstash Redis as the Socket.io adapter for broadcasting events across multiple server instances
Add background job processing for async work triggered by real-time events (e.g., fanout, rate-limited notifications)
Add error monitoring for both the Next.js app and the Socket.io server
Set up unit testing for event handlers and business logic
Deploy the Next.js app to Vercel (Socket.io server needs a persistent host like Railway or Fly.io)
